descriptionSmall.description: Cookie-consent banner body for small and extra-small screens. Keep it short and wrap the word meaning 'cookies' in <cookiesLink>...</cookiesLink>.

descriptionDesktop.description: Cookie-consent banner body for medium and larger screens. Explains analytics improve Namefi for the user and others; wrap the word meaning 'cookies' in <cookiesLink>...</cookiesLink>.

reject.description: Consent banner button: decline non-essential (analytics) cookies. Essential cookies still run.

accept.description: Consent banner button: accept analytics cookies.
